chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-709 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners, filed rejoinder affidavit on para-wise comments, filed by respondent No.5 on behalf of the respondent No.4, same is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the learned AAG. AAG pointed out that case of petitioner cannot be decided by filing constitutional petition and he should avail proper remedy. The Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions does not press the instant petition, on the ground that he will file Review before appellate forum. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
